title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at ABB India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at ABB India
jsonLd.description:
ABB India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Mysuru operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About ABB India:
ABB India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ABB India!
